description: Test suite for API endpoints related to health check and overdue actions in a Django REST Framework project.

classes.name: HealthTests
classes.description: Test case for health check endpoint.

classes.name: OverdueActionsTests
classes.description: Test case for overdue actions API endpoint, including setup for workflow statuses and overdue action creation.

methods.name: test_health
methods.description: Tests that the health endpoint returns a 200 status and expected message.

methods.name: _seed_statuses_if_missing
methods.description: Ensures core workflow statuses exist for testing, creating them if missing.

methods.name: test_overdue_actions_endpoint_returns_overdue_and_excludes_done
methods.description: Verifies overdue actions are correctly returned and completed actions are excluded.
